title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: 'Ten lifetimes won't be enough', Abhishek Banerjee challenges BJP to contest from Falta
description: Trinamool Congress leader Abhishek Banerjee strongly responded to remarks by BJP leader Amit Malviya over ECI decision to order fresh polling in the Falta Assembly constituency, defending what he described as the "Diamond Harbour model crumbles"
